isi.lyrics:
Lyric J-Cera - 이젠 날 찾을거야 (Now You'll Find Me)

Romanization

ijen neol ijeulgeoya ijen nal chajeulgeoya saeroda sijagiya

maeil neoreul mannasseo chingguinjul arasseo
neon kikkeugo yeppeune joahaesseo
gobaek hae bondaneunggeol jalhaebora haetjiman
jakkuman hwaga nasseo
charari jal doenggeoya jjaksarang haneunggeol sildeora

maeum deulkijima yeogi kkajinggeoya~
honja joahaneungge mwoya
neoreul saranghaeseo naman apeulgeoya
keojineun naemaeum jagajige domang gabollae
ijen neol ijeulgeoya ijen nal chajeulgeoya saeroda sijagiya
ijen neol ijeulgeoya ijen nal chajeulgeoya saeroda sijagiya

sureul hanjan masyeosseo niga bogo sipeojyeo
bamsae neol bulleodaesseo
charari jal doenggeoya chinggu joeulgeon eopdeora

maeum deulkijima yeogi kkajinggeoya~
honja joahaneungge mwoya
neoreul saranghaeseo naman apeulgeoya
keojineun naemaeum jagajige domangga bollae

geureonde jakku nummurina na anin saramgwa haengbokhal ni moseup
deo isang joeun chinggudo halsu eopseo eotteokhae

maeum deulkijima yeogi kkajinggeoya~
honja joahaneungge mwoya
neoreul saranghaeseo naman apeulgeoya
keojineun naemaeum jagajige domang gabollae
ijen neol ijeulgeoya ijen nal chajeulgeoya
ijen neol ijeulgeoya ijen nal chajeulgeoya

Hangeul

이젠 널 잊을거야 이젠 날 찾을거야 새로다 시작이야

매일 너를 만났어 친구인줄 알았어
넌 키끄고 예쁜에 좋아했어
고백 해 본다는걸 잘해보라 했지만
자꾸만 화가 났어
차라리 잘 된거야 짝사랑 하는걸 싫더라

마음 들키지마 여기 까진거야~
혼자 좋아하는게 뭐야
너를 사랑해서 나만 아플거야
커지는 내마음 작아지게 도망 가볼래
이젠 널 잊을거야 이젠 날 찾을거야 새로다 시작이야
이젠 널 잊을거야 이젠 날 찾을거야 새로다 시작이야

술을 한잔 마셨어 니가 보고 싶어져
밤새 널 불러댔어
차라리 잘 된거야 친구 좋을건 없더라

마음 들키지마 여기 까진거야~
혼자 좋아하는게 뭐야
너를 사랑해서 나만 아플거야
커지는 내마음 작아지게 도망가 볼래

그런데 자꾸 눈물이나 나 아닌 사람과 행복할 니 모습
더 이상 좋은 친구도 할수 없어 어떡해

마음 들키지마 여기 까진거야~
혼자 좋아하는게 뭐야
너를 사랑해서 나만 아플거야
커지는 내마음 작아지게 도망 가볼래
이젠 널 잊을거야 이젠 날 찾을거야
이젠 널 잊을거야 이젠 날 찾을거야

isi.driveFileNames: FIFTY FIFTY - Wish You Were Here.mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric FIFTY FIFTY - Wish You Were Here

Romanization

So, so you think you can tell
Heaven from Hell,
Blue skies from pain

Can you tell a green field
From a cold steel rail?

A smile from a veil?
Do you think you can tell?

Did they get you to trade
Your heroes for ghosts?
Hot ashes for trees?
Hot air for a cool breeze?

Cold comfort for change?
And did you exchange
A walk on part in the war
For a lead role in a cage?

Oh
How I wish, how I wish you were here.
We're just two lost souls
Swimming in a fish bowl,
Year after year,

Running over the same old ground.
What have we found
The same old fears.
Wish you were here

Wish you were here
Wish you were here
Wish you were here
Wish you were here
Wish you were here

The same old fears.
Wish you were here

Hangeul

So, so you think you can tell
Heaven from Hell,
Blue skies from pain

Can you tell a green field

A smile from a veil?
Do you think you can tell?

Wish you were here

Wish you were here
Wish you were here
Wish you were here
Wish you were here
Wish you were here

The same old fears.
Wish you were here
